name: spike
description: Run timeboxed disposable experiments to de-risk planning and implementation.

interface.longDescription: Runs timeboxed throwaway experiments to answer feasibility, integration, API, performance, or UI approach questions before production planning or implementation.
defaultPrompt: Spike whether this approach works before we plan it.
Run a throwaway prototype to de-risk this integration.
I don't know enough to plan this yet; spike it first.
